description: A perfect casual footwear choice for the man of style, this pair of sandals from lee cooper is crafted from a combination of leather and soft fabric to offer exemplary comfort. Upper Wide criss cross leather straps with velcro closures at the mid-foot and at the back of the heel with padded fabric inner lining for sweat-free and abrasion-free comfort Padded foot-bed ergonomically raised with circular nubs to offer a massage feel Outsole TPU outsole with a terraced herringbone pattern for absolute grip and traction Curved mid-foot for ergonomic comfort Sandal care Wipe away dust with a clean and dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
